name: io.github.nirholas/scene-mcp
title: three.ws Scenes
description: Speak 3D worlds into being — compose a placed diorama plan from one sentence, then browse the saved gallery.

environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the three.ws API that serves /api/diorama. Override only when self-hosting or targeting a preview deployment.

environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds. compose_scene runs a server-side LLM chain, so the default is generous.
